mae_slice_sct_qa.display_name: [T1w MRI-to-CT MAE prediction] [Brain] FedSynthCT MRI-T1w 2D MAE prediction
mae_slice_sct_qa.description:
This model predicts the conversion error of a synthetic CT on a per-slice basis. The model was trained using sCTs generated with FedSynthCT-Brain models.
Please note that the predicted MAE values are clipped at 135.
Read more about this model

Input: Synthetic CTs
Output: MAE prediction per-slice

How to cite:
If you use this model, please cite:
Zaffino P, Raggio CB, Thummerer A, Marmitt GG, Langendijk JA, Procopio A, Cosentino C, Seco J, Knopf AC, Both S, Spadea MF. Toward closing the loop in image-to-image conversion in radiotherapy: A quality control tool to predict synthetic computed tomography hounsfield unit accuracy. Journal of imaging. 2024 Dec 10;10(12):316
